case_title: WANGUN HUANG VS. DENNIS JOSUE VARGAS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HUANG, WANGUN AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, DENNIS JOSUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, WANGUN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED SEP-06-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, DENNIS JOSUE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-28-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE CONTINUED FOR 6 MONTHS. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER--KENNY FUNG. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CASE SETTLED THROUGH MEDIATION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT OF 10/18/12 TO AUG-28-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2013 - CONTINUED FOR CANTONESE INTERPRETER TO SEP-18-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. CANTONESE INTERPRETER ORDERED FOR THE PLAINTIFF, FOR THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER--DOROTHY WONG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, WANGUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VARGAS, DENNIS JOSUE $2,600.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR HUANG, WANGUN ASSIGNED TO LEE, JAMES LEONARD DBA JUDGMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $330.51 ACCRUED INTEREST, $199.89 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, DENNIS JOSUE
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE LEE, JAMES LEONARD DBA JUDGMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, DENNIS JOSUE
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, DENNIS JOSUE
